creator: des@des.follo.net
text:
At the top of the FAQ is the following text:

"This is the FAQ for FreeBSD systems version 2.X All entries are assumed
to be relevant to FreeBSD 2.0.5 and later, unless otherwise noted. [...]"

The first sentence in the preface is "Welcome to the FreeBSD 2.X FAQ!"

Severity/priority set to max due to impending release.

Fix: 

Correct relevant instances of "2.x" to "3.x".
How-To-Repeat: 
Point your browser at http://www.freebsd.org/FAQ/
